## Collections.Classes.LazyInstantiatorFactory type

A factory which can create a value from a base value and key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type LazyInstantiatorFactory<TKey extends string, TBase, TValue> = (base: TBase, key: TKey) => Result<TValue>;
```
